info.title: Spam Shield API
info.description: Spam Shield API. Real-time spam scoring for emails, phone numbers, and text content. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Real-time spam scoring for emails, phone numbers, and text content.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
